title: Suspiros de España
writer: Antonio Álvarez Alonso, Antonio Quintero, Benito Perojo
actors: Miguel Ligero, Estrellita Castro, Roberto Rey
plot: Soledad and her battling mother work as laundresses in Seville. When Sole's lively godfather sends a photograph of her to a musical producer, an agent is sent to seek her and she is offered a contract in la Habana. Tempting fame a...
